nodes.name: en.json
nodes.summary: English (en) i18n translation resource file for the admin panel UI. Contains ~55 top-level namespaces covering all UI strings: common labels, dashboard, providers, auth files, quota displays, logs, monitor, config, channel groups, ccswitch import, visual config, system info, notifications, themes, and page-specific texts for ~30 pages/features.

nodes.name: ru.json
nodes.summary: Russian (ru) i18n translation resource file for the admin panel UI. Mirrors the en.json key structure with Russian translations for all UI namespaces. Slightly smaller (2171 lines) indicating incomplete coverage compared to en.json.

nodes.name: zh-CN.json
nodes.summary: Simplified Chinese (zh-CN) i18n translation resource file for the admin panel UI. Largest locale file (3824 lines) with full coverage of all UI namespaces. Serves as the fallback locale (configured in i18n/index.ts).

nodes.name: common
nodes.summary: Common UI labels and actions: login/logout, save/delete/edit, status indicators, button texts, copy actions, basic form labels (api_key, base_url, proxy_url), model placeholders, and common success/error/info/warning messages.

nodes.name: login
nodes.summary: Login page translations: form labels (username, password), error messages (invalid credentials, expired session), and action buttons for authentication flow.

nodes.name: dashboard
nodes.summary: Dashboard page translations: KPI labels, status indicators, system health metrics, and summary cards for the main landing page.

nodes.name: auth_files
nodes.summary: Auth files page translations: file listing, quota preview panels for multiple providers (antigravity, claude, codex, gemini-cli, kiro), file actions (rename, delete, upload), status filters, file type badges, tags, model owner groups, and alias management.

nodes.name: providers
nodes.summary: Providers page translations: provider configuration forms, API key management, model discovery, connection testing, OpenCodeGo integration, Bedrock setup, OpenAI provider sections, proxy pool binding, excluded models, and provider status badges.

nodes.name: monitor
nodes.summary: Monitor/usage analytics page translations: time range selectors, KPI cards, charts (daily trend, hourly breakdown, model distribution), usage statistics, and data formatting labels.

nodes.name: ccswitch
nodes.summary: CCSwitch import feature translations: configuration import from ChatGPT/Claude Code, provider name mapping, model selection, permission compatibility, and import settings forms.

nodes.name: config_page
nodes.summary: Main config page translations: runtime config panel, YAML editor, floating save bar, config sections (API keys, quota strategy, channel groups routing, request logs toggle, and system settings).

nodes.name: system_page
nodes.summary: System settings page translations: API key configuration, CORS settings, quota strategy (switch project/preview model), identity fingerprint, encryption settings, and system-level configuration options.

nodes.name: request_logs
nodes.summary: Request logs page translations: log listing, filtering by status/method/path, pagination, log detail views, timestamps, latency formatting, and API call error messages.

nodes.name: channel_groups_page
nodes.summary: Channel groups management page translations: routing configuration, channel group CRUD, path-based routing rules, priority settings, model routing options, and tag-based channel filtering.

nodes.name: visual_config
nodes.summary: Visual config editor translations: payload rules editor, filter rules, protocol options, payload value types, and visual configuration form labels.

nodes.name: auto_update
nodes.summary: Auto-update feature translations: update prompts, heartbeat status, version display, update progress indicators, and updater sidecar connectivity messages.

nodes.name: log_content
nodes.summary: Log content viewer translations: rich markdown rendering, message blocks, content modal labels, copy actions, and log content formatting strings.

nodes.name: models_page
nodes.summary: Models management page translations: model CRUD forms, pricing configuration, model capability badges, model vendor icons, availability toggles, owner presets, and OpenRouter sync settings.

nodes.name: api_keys_page
nodes.summary: API keys management page translations: key creation/editing forms, key masking, spending limits, permission profiles, CcSwitch import cards, usage modals, and key status indicators.

nodes.name: oauth
nodes.summary: OAuth login flow translations: OAuth dialog, provider selection, authorization page texts, redirect messages, and OAuth-related error/success messages.

edges.label: shared key structure (zh-CN is superset of en)
shared key structure (ru maps to en keys)
